seoTitle: Arthur River vs Ashby — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Arthur River and Ashby. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Arthur River vs Ashby: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Arthur River and Ashby.
heading: Arthur River vs Ashby — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Arthur River, Western Australia and Ashby, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Ashby has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Arthur River (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Arthur River or Ashby safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Arthur River has a flood risk score of 50/100, while Ashby scores 31/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Arthur River scores 63/100 for bushfire risk. Ashby scores 23/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Arthur River or Ashby?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Ashby has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.98% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
